caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white long-sleeved tunic and a light-colored vest, stands at a wooden podium giving a speech. He is positioned in front of a tall, textured green wall with an intricate pattern. To his right, two other men are seated; one wears a white garment and a blue vest, while the other is partially visible behind him. The setting features ornate vertical wooden columns with carved gold-colored accents. As the scene progresses, the speaker gestures with his right hand while addressing the audience, shifting his posture slightly. The seated individuals remain relatively still, looking toward the speaker. There is no visible on-screen text, logos, or electronic equipment other than the podium. The lighting remains consistent across the sequence, highlighting the speaker against the patterned backdrop.
